subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and We have answered thee with truth as a mercy from Us unto thee, that thou mayest be thankful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و اجبناک بالحق رحمه من لدنا علیک لتکون شاکرا بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
